title: rafnia capensis subsp. ovata
intro: Rafnia capensis subsp. ovata, also known as Rafnia, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and trifoliate leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rafnia include its ability to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders and its potential anti-cancer properties. Rafnia is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
